chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ إِنَّمَا يُعْطِي الدِّينَ مَنْ يُحِبُّهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 95 – Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, rather, Gives the Religion to the one whom He<sup>azwj</sup> Loves

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (160/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (160/ 9)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ الدُّنْيَا يُعْطِيهَا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَنْ أَحَبَّ وَ مَنْ أَبْغَضَ وَ إِنَّ الْإِيمَانَ لَا يُعْطِيهِ إِلَّا مَنْ أَحَبَّهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Numan, from Abu Suleyman, from Muyassar who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The world, Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Gives it to the one Heazwj Loves and the one Heazwj Hates, and the Emān, Heazwj does not Give it except to the one Heazwj Loves’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Nu’man from abu Sulayman from Muyassir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, gives the world to those He loves as well as to those He hates, but He does not give belief to anyone except those He loves.”
